title: IaP Cost Report v1
description: The cost report a conformant cost tool emits (spec ch. 16 §16.2/§16.8, IEP-0005). A pure function of three versioned inputs — the canonical profile-merged document (identified by modelHash), a mapping cost model (costModel), and a content-addressed price snapshot (priceSnapshot) — so identical inputs yield a byte-identical report (§16.9).

profile.description: The active profile the report is relative to (null = base document). One report per profile (§16.3).

modelHash.description: SHA-256 (hex) of the canonical model the report was computed from — the reproducibility anchor (§16.9).

priceSnapshot.description: The price snapshot content address (id#sha256:<hex>) used for every amount below.

costModel.description: The cost model identity as id@version.

resources.description: Resource id → cost entry, sorted by id.

byApplication.description: Application id → aggregated cost over its components.

byLabel.description: 'key=value' → aggregated cost over resources carrying that label.

rule.description: The deterministic rule id that fired.

confidence.description: exact: price fully determined by declared fields; estimate: usage-dependent, priced from stated assumptions; unknown: the cost model does not cover this resource, or a required price is missing from the snapshot (§16.2).

estimatedMonthly.description: Projected cost per 730-hour month. ABSENT when confidence is unknown (no guessed numbers, §16.2).

estimatedHourly.description: Projected cost per hour. Absent when confidence is unknown.

assumptions.description: Every usage assumption behind an estimate, and (for unknown) the reason it could not be priced.

estimatedMonthly.description: Sum of the priced members' estimatedMonthly.

lowerBound.description: True when the aggregate omits one or more unknown-confidence members — the total is a lower bound (§16.2).
